_comment: Lockfile for data/admin-dong.geojson.gz. Build script verifies sha256 of the .gz file before reading; mismatch → exit 1 with restore guidance. Locked-in by /plan-eng-review 2026-04-17 (zone-polygons-v1, Action Item #2: data source lockfile).
_storage_note: Committed gzipped (-22MB vs raw) to keep clone size sane. scripts/build-zones.ts streams through zlib.gunzipSync on read.
_id_field_note: Use properties.adm_cd2 (10-digit BJDONG code) as dong_codes; properties.adm_cd is the 8-digit short form.
